completed_tasks.name: Refresh runtime status text per activity locale
Build and install release variants on connected devices

remaining_tasks.name: Resume localization follow-up only if English-mode issue is still reproducible after latest commit

human_actions_pending.action: Verify whether the English-mode localization issue is fixed on-device after commit cf30397
human_actions_pending.context: The fix compiles and was committed, but no post-fix device verification was run in this session.

decisions.decision: Non-root /launch is intentionally removed from the supported 1.x runtime surface.
decisions.rationale: It is not reliable enough to remain a truthful supported primitive and future launch work is deferred to a root-backed 2.0 line.

decisions.decision: Localization fix stays narrow by rebinding AppTextResolver to activity context and refreshing stored runtime strings on resume.
decisions.rationale: The issue looked like stale localized text rather than missing English resources, so a narrow runtime text refresh was preferable to a broad locale-system rewrite.

next_action: Start with `git push origin main` if you want the merged 1.2 line and localization fix synced remotely; otherwise verify the localization fix on-device before more code changes.
context_notes: Repo is currently on main with a clean worktree. Phase 21 code landed, launch was removed from the 1.x surface, and a narrow localization fix was committed last. STATE/ROADMAP still point to Phase 21 as the active execution thread, so resume should treat this as post-phase cleanup rather than new feature work.
